statusReason: Planning packet initialized from interpreted operator input. No local reproduction, implementation, test, certification, production mutation, commit, push, or deployment is claimed.

requirementsRecovery.decision: Blank, control-only, and whitespace-only native/HTMX submissions may receive HTTP validation but execute zero SearchEngine or downstream search-domain work.

executionHistory.summary: Reconciled the UX-owned Search contract with desktop and mobile wireframes, a closed visible-state vocabulary, keyboard and screen-reader behavior, baseline and enhanced submission flows, real-stack Playwright-visible outcomes, and routed design questions. No implementation, test execution, evidence, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, or deployment is claimed.

Replaced the initialization design with a code-grounded secure Search architecture: same-origin source-locked HTMX, strict CSP/SRI, a semantic baseline POST form, exactly-once enhancement, typed full-page and fragment states, private telemetry, real-browser request-and-DOM validation, compatibility canaries, and narrow rollback. No spec, scope, report, user validation, scenario manifest, source, test, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, or deployment change is claimed.

Reconciled GRILL-06 in analyst-owned requirements: native and HTMX blank/control/whitespace submissions may receive accessible HTTP validation but must execute zero SearchEngine or downstream search-domain work. Preserved SCN-002-006-04. No source, test, design, scope, report, user validation, certification, commit, push, or deployment work is claimed.

Planning reconciliation (spec-scope-hardening harden): re-derived scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, and test-plan.json against the revised spec.md/design.md (both 2026-07-24T05:46Z). Reconciled SCN-002-006-04 from the superseded 'empty query sends no request' framing to the authoritative 'blank query performs no search-domain work' contract (empty/control-only/whitespace-only/mixed input on native or HTMX paths executes zero SearchEngine and downstream search-domain dispatch; HTTP validation permitted). Expanded certification.scopeProgress to the four planned scopes. Kept status in_progress; no source, test, certification, commit, push, or deployment change is claimed.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
